at0000.1.description: A persistent and managed list of vaccinations that have been administered to an individual over time.
Een permanente en beheerde lijst van toegediende vaccinaties aan een persoon over een periode van tijd

at0020.1.description: Name of the medication, vaccine or other therapeutic/prescribable item which was the focus of the activity.
at0020.1.comment:
FHIR terminology binding to the CH VACD Swissmedic vaccine value set. Expansion via tx.fhir.ch:
https://tx.fhir.ch/r4/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://fhir.ch/ig/ch-vacd/ValueSet/ch-vacd-swissmedic-vaccines-vs&_format=json

at0156.1.description: The clinical reason for the medication activity.
at0156.1.comment:
FHIR terminology binding to the HL7 FHIR immunization reason value set. Expansion via tx.fhir.ch:
https://tx.fhir.ch/r4/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/immunization-reason&_format=json

at0147.1.description: The route by which the ordered item was, or is to be, administered into the subject's body.
at0147.1.comment:
FHIR terminology binding to the CH VACD route of administration value set. Expansion via tx.fhir.ch:
https://tx.fhir.ch/r4/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://fhir.ch/ig/ch-vacd/ValueSet/ch-vacd-route-of-administration-vs&_format=json

at0141.1.description: Structured description of the site of administration of the ordered item.
at0141.1.comment:
FHIR terminology binding to the HL7 FHIR immunization site value set. Expansion via tx.fhir.ch:
https://tx.fhir.ch/r4/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/immunization-site&_format=json

author.name: Vebjørn Arntzen, Silje Ljosland Bakke, John Tore Valand
author.organisation: Oslo universitetssykehus HF, Helse Vest IKT AS, Norway

author.name: Débora Farage, Fernanda Maia, Adriana Kitajima, Ana Paula Andrade, Clóvis Puttini

at0150.1.description: The identifier assigned to the production batch by the manufacturer during production.

at0003.1.description: The expiry date and/or time of the medication or medication component, as given by the manufacturer or individual preparing the mixture.
at0003.1.comment:
Any other form of expiry date, such as time from production or depending on storage environment, can be inserted using a specific CLUSTER archetype in the Substance Details slot or added as part of the Description.
 For example: '2017-05-23'.

author.name: Sofia Janstad, Jörgen Kuylenstierna, Åsa Skagerhult, Linda Aulin Lundeqvist, Samira Nikman, Manna Vosta, Rikard Lövström
author.organisation: SLL, eWeave AB, Västra Götalandsregionen, Karolinska universitetssjukhuset, Karolinska University Hospital

author.name: Silje Ljosland Bakke
author.organisation: Nasjonal IKT HF, Helse Vest IKT AS

at0144.1.description: The amount of medication administered at one time.
at0144.1.comment: For example: 1 mg, 1.5 ml, 0.125 g; or 1-2 ml, 12.5-20.5 mg.

author.name: Nazli Soltani, Natalia Strauch, Alexander Bachmeier
author.organisation: UMG, Medizinische Schule Hannover (MHH), Medizinische Hochschule Hannover, Heidelberg University Hospital
